name: compute_waterfall
description: Compute LP/GP equity waterfall distribution. Allocates distributable cash flows through preferred return, GP catch-up, and promote tiers based on hurdle IRRs. Follows standard real estate private equity waterfall conventions with configurable tier splits.

total_equity_invested.description: Total equity contributed by all partners

distributable_cash_flows.description: Array of annual distributable cash flows (including exit proceeds in final year)

preferred_return.description: Preferred return rate as decimal (e.g. 0.08 = 8% pref)

hurdle_irr.description: IRR hurdle for this tier as decimal

tiers.description: Promote tiers above the preferred return

catch_up_rate.description: GP catch-up rate as decimal (e.g. 1.0 = 100% to GP until caught up)

catch_up_to_gp_pct.description: Target GP percentage for catch-up calculation
